items.caption: A collection of five different types of gloves, each with a label indicating its name. starting from the top left, there are vinyl gloves, rubber gloves, nitrile gloves, latex gloves, and non-latex gloves. each pair of gloves is shown in a different color and style, with the vinyl gloves being blue, the rubber gloves being white, the nitrile gloves being blue, the latex gloves being white, and the non-latex gloves being blue. the gloves are arranged in a grid format against a white background.
